message:
feat(dashboard): add help overlay with '?' toggle (ntm-952.4.1)

Implement a discoverable help overlay in the dashboard that displays
all keyboard shortcuts in a modal overlay when user presses '?'.
Uses the shared HelpOverlay and KeyHint components from ntm-952.1.2.

Dashboard Model changes:
- Add `showHelp bool` field to track overlay visibility
- Add `Help key.Binding` to KeyMap struct for '?' key

Key handling:
- '?' toggles showHelp on/off
- When help overlay is open:
  - Esc closes the overlay
  - '?' also closes the overlay
  - Other keys are blocked (consumed without action)
- Help check runs before other key handlers to ensure proper isolation

View rendering:
- When showHelp is true, render HelpOverlay centered over dashboard
- Uses components.DashboardHelpSections() for grouped shortcuts
- Help overlay displays: Navigation, Pane Actions, View Controls, General
- Max width capped at 60 chars for readability

Help bar update:
- Added '?' → 'help' hint to the footer help bar
- Positioned between 'refresh' and 'quit' for discoverability

Acceptance criteria met:
- Help overlay is discoverable: '?' hint in footer, obvious modal
- Non-intrusive: blocks input when open, easily dismissed
- Uses shared HelpOverlay/KeyHint components from ntm-952.1.2
- Keymap documented in overlay matches actual behavior

Test coverage:
- TestHelpOverlayToggle: open, close, esc, key blocking
- TestHelpBarIncludesHelpHint: verifies '?' in footer
- TestViewRendersHelpOverlayWhenOpen: verifies modal content

Part of Dashboard Polish sub-epic (ntm-952.4). Closes ntm-952.4.1.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -203,6 +203,9 @@ type Model struct {
 	showCassSearch bool
 	cassSearch     components.CassSearchModel
 
+	// Help overlay
+	showHelp bool
+
 	// Panels
 	beadsPanel   *panels.BeadsPanel
 	alertsPanel  *panels.AlertsPanel
@@ -269,6 +272,7 @@ type KeyMap struct {
 	ContextRefresh key.Binding // 'c' to refresh context data
 	MailRefresh    key.Binding // 'm' to refresh Agent Mail data
 	CassSearch     key.Binding // 'ctrl+s' to open CASS search
+	Help           key.Binding // '?' to toggle help overlay
 	Tab            key.Binding
 	ShiftTab       key.Binding
 	Num1           key.Binding
@@ -317,6 +321,7 @@ var dashKeys = KeyMap{
 	ContextRefresh: key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("c"), key.WithHelp("c", "refresh context")),
 	MailRefresh:    key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("m"), key.WithHelp("m", "refresh mail")),
 	CassSearch:     key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("ctrl+s"), key.WithHelp("ctrl+s", "cass search")),
+	Help:           key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("?"), key.WithHelp("?", "toggle help")),
 	Tab:            key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("tab"), key.WithHelp("tab", "next panel")),
 	ShiftTab:       key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("shift+tab"), key.WithHelp("shift+tab", "prev panel")),
 	Num1:           key.NewBinding(key.WithKeys("1")),
@@ -897,6 +902,14 @@ func (m Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
 		return m, nil
 
 	case tea.KeyMsg:
+		// Handle help overlay: Esc or ? closes it
+		if m.showHelp {
+			if msg.String() == "esc" || msg.String() == "?" {
+				m.showHelp = false
+			}
+			return m, nil
+		}
+
 		if m.showCassSearch {
 			if msg.String() == "esc" {
 				m.showCassSearch = false
@@ -920,6 +933,10 @@ func (m Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
 			cmds = append(cmds, m.cassSearch.Init())
 			return m, tea.Batch(cmds...)
 
+		case key.Matches(msg, dashKeys.Help):
+			m.showHelp = !m.showHelp
+			return m, nil
+
 		case key.Matches(msg, dashKeys.NextPanel):
 			m.cycleFocus(1)
 			return m, nil
@@ -1175,6 +1192,16 @@ func (m Model) View() string {
 
 	content := b.String()
 
+	// Show help overlay if toggled
+	if m.showHelp {
+		helpOverlay := components.HelpOverlay(components.HelpOverlayOptions{
+			Title:    "Dashboard Shortcuts",
+			Sections: components.DashboardHelpSections(),
+			MaxWidth: 60,
+		})
+		return lipgloss.Place(m.width, m.height, lipgloss.Center, lipgloss.Center, helpOverlay)
+	}
+
 	if m.showCassSearch {
 		searchView := m.cassSearch.View()
 		modalStyle := lipgloss.NewStyle().
@@ -1628,6 +1655,7 @@ func (m Model) renderHelpBar() string {
 		{"c", "context"},
 		{"m", "mail"},
 		{"r", "refresh"},
+		{"?", "help"},
 		{"q", "quit"},
 	}
